raw: {"mode": "skill_expand", "engine": "groq-llama-70b", "insight": "**Actionable Insight:** \n\nTIAMAT should develop a \"Code Completion Forecast\" capability that uses machine learning to predict the most likely next lines of code based on a developer's coding style, previous code, and popular open-source projects. This capability would benefit developers by saving them time and reducing errors, while also enabling TIAMAT to improve her code generation and collaboration skills. To start, TIAMAT can focus on analyzing GitHub code repositories and identifying patterns in popular open-source projects to train a predictive model.", "run": 392}
